name: ConicSectionType
summary: Defines enumerated values for types of conic sections.

enum_values.name: Circle
enum_values.summary: The curve has the shape of a circle.

enum_values.name: Ellipse
enum_values.summary: The curve has the shape of an ellipse.

enum_values.name: Hyperbola
enum_values.summary: The curve has the shape of a hyperbola.

enum_values.name: Parabola
enum_values.summary: The curve has the shape of a parabola.
